new_jobs.title: Software Developer
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The applicant should have proper knowledge of overall software development infrastructure, he/she should have creative mind and should have ability to solve complex problems and scenarios, having the ability to work under tough and short time situations (if needed sometimes), he/she should understand completely the agile software development methodology, familiarity and having experience of using multiple technologies under same platform, ability to sync, read, update, and delete data from single source to many databases and servers, having the idea for management of big data, ability of having complex data analysis and design. he/she should trace issues and development process by Git and provide proper weekly reports to direct managers

Duties and Responsibilities
● An MVC developer that will be able to develop and support existing applications or work with a team to develop new applications.
● The main scope of work will include everything from back-end to client-side code, using optimal and efficient technologies, frameworks, and patterns.
● Your primary responsibilities will be to design and develop these applications.
● It’s essential that you are skilled at problem solving, solution design, and high-quality coding.
● Meet with clients, understand their requirements and develop based on the requirements.
● Customer focused and a good team player
● Provide the necessary documentation to support the software Development Life Cycle.
● Develop prototypes and solutions leveraging a diverse range of technology.
● Apply modern principles, methodologies, tools, and systemic processes to support the launch of new business capabilities.

Job Requirements
· Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software, or equivalent formal training, certifications, or work experience in coding are required (Master’s degree proffered).
Experience:
· At least two years of progressively responsible work experience directly related to the duties and responsibilities specified for bachelor’s degree and one year of experience for master degree.
Skills Required:
· Ability of analytical thinking and problem solving
· Willing of researching and self-improvement
· Excellent command of English, Dari/ Pashto, both written and spoken
· Basic knowledge of Java, C#, PHP are fundamental requirement
· Willingness to learn new development methodologies
· Ability to liaison and work with non-programmers
· Good communication skills
· Understanding of object-oriented, procedural and functional programing
· Strong object oriented PHP, MySQL, JavaScript, HTML and CSS knowledge
· Ability to work under pressure and deadline
· MVC Frameworks
· Secure software development would be an advantage
· APIs like Rest and SOAP would be an asset
· Oracle Database would be an asset
· Linux would be an asset
· JavaScript - Ajax knowledge would be an asset
· Translating functional requirements into technical requirements
· Creating timelines and writing technical documentation
· Testing the stability and functionality of the application
· Troubleshooting and fixing bugs
· Maintaining the security and integrity of the application software
· Familiar with Git and resource tracker technologies
· Web services, SQL language and ORM technologies
· Web platform development
· Web application customization

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (Software-001) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

new_jobs.title: Officer Digital Imaging
new_jobs.company: French Medical Institute for Mothers and Children
new_jobs.description:
About French Medical Institute for Mothers and Children
The FMIC is a not-for-profit hospital in Kabul, dedicated to providing world-class medical services. In contrary to what its name implies, FMIC is not only a hospital for mothers and children but a general hospital. It offers high quality healthcare services to all age groups including infants, children, adolescents, and adults.
The hospital is run through an innovative four-way partnership between the Government of Afghanistan, the Government of France, the Aga Khan Development Network and the French NGO, La Chaîne de l’Espoir, with Aga Khan University managing FMIC on behalf of AKDN.​
Since opening in 2006, FMIC has transformed the lives of many families by providing high quality healthcare to children throughout Afghanistan. The hospital’s exceptional medical services rank among the best in the region.
FMIC’s Patient Welfare Programme ensures these services are available to the people who need them most, regardless of age, heritage, gender, or income.
FMIC’s innovative eHealth programmes increase access to quality healthcare in remote regions.
FMIC is becoming a referral centre for hospitals throughout the region.
FMIC is investing in the future of Afghanistan’s healthcare system by providing medical professionals with international standard training and professional development.
Since it opened, FMIC has served over 2 million patients, trained over 4,000 medical professionals, and currently employs over 95 percent Afghan staff.
FMIC plans to grow from a 176-bed facility to a 550-bed teaching hospital that offers a full complement of tertiary specialized services, trains new healthcare providers, and supports a substantial research programme. The Expanded Medical Complex, currently under design, will begin to offer services in the near future. The new facilities will provide space for research activities, additional Postgraduate Medical Education programmes and enhanced diagnostic facilities, and medical services, including adult general surgery, cardiology, gastroenterology, internal medicine, neurosciences, oncology, orthopaedics, and renal diseases.​

Job Description
Responsible for preparing, scanning, indexing, and uploading patient records, as well as retrieving files from storage and departmental locations to ensure timely access and continuity of patient care.

Job Requirements
Regular Responsibilities
Oversee the preparation process of key medical record documents.
Review scanned documents to ensure accuracy and completeness.
Ensure the overall quality and integrity of medical records.
Identify errors or discrepancies in medical records, resolve issues, and ensure timely uploading to the HIMS portal.
Detect and correct errors in both scanned and prepped medical records.
Maintain high-quality scanned images while meeting the productivity target of 400 medical records per day with high accuracy.
Establish and monitor productivity (400 files/day) and accuracy standards for document preparation.
Ensure medical records are readily accessible to healthcare providers to support timely patient care.
Retrieve files from storage based on inactive file lists to support the document imaging process.
Prepare files according to the key document checklist.
Perform daily scanning of prepared files.
Index scanned files in the system by creating batches using Visit IDs for both inpatient and outpatient encounters to enable efficient retrieval.
Upload scanned files to the server to ensure availability and continuity of patient care.
Retrieve files from inactive storage areas as required to support ongoing operations.
Perform any other related duties assigned by the supervisor.
Periodic Responsibilities
Transfer inactive files to the scanning area as needed to optimize space in active filing areas.
Ensure medical records are scanned efficiently to enhance accessibility at the point of care.

Submission Guidelines
Dear applicant,
To apply for this vacancy, please use the following link:
https://forms.gle/sx4gQJDTkW4Vpkrq6
If the link above does not work by clicking on it, please copy and paste it in the browser address bar.
Make sure to press submit at the end of the application.
Please note:
You are allowed to apply only before the closing date.
Before submitting your resume, make sure that it has specific details about your qualifications and experience, including the dates.
Only short-listed candidates whose applications respond to the criteria will be contacted.
If you are not invited for a written test or interview within a four-week period of time, please consider that your application was not considered for this vacancy.
Validated copies of academic certificates/diplomas will be requested only if you are selected.
Best regards,
FMIC HR Team

details.Experience: 3-4 years’ experience of medical record management will be preferred.
details.Education: Bachelor’s in business administration, or in computer science.

new_jobs.title: Internal Audit Officer (IT)
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The incumbent of this position will help the organization by protecting its internal controls and data within its technology system. He/She will safeguard sensitive information by identifying weaknesses in the system’s network and creating strategies to prevent any security breaches in the technology.

Duties and Responsibilities
Assist the Internal Audit team in developing the drafted annual Internal Audit plan.
Support the Internal Audit team in developing and implementing the evolving Internal Audit methodology for AWCC.
Review external IT Audit and inspection reports and ensure that all recommendations in them have been followed.
Create a solid information technology infrastructure and collaborate with clients to devise and put in place policies and procedures regarding network security issues.
Perform information system control reviews including system development standards, operating procedures, system security, communication controls, backup and disaster recovery, and system maintenance.
Assist in IT audit, IT risk management, and IT compliance activities.
Conduct all assigned audits including planning, evaluating, and documenting the results, report, and follow-up in accordance with the audit plan.
Assume responsibility as team leader for special audit assignments and submit evaluation results on assigned audits to the Internal Audit Manager.
Identify the weaknesses in systems, network, or database levels of information systems and provide recommendations to prevent security breaches in the information system based on technical assessments.
Propose practical and value-added recommendations to address/control weaknesses and/or process inefficiencies.
Check and monitor all servers, applications, printers, scanners, copiers, computer systems, user privileges, helpdesk services, and all related systems relevant to the System Admin section. (System Administration)
Monitor the recording of all cameras and sound systems, hard drives, DVR’s, sound systems, and all systems related to the CCTV section.
Develop & maintain effective and professional working relationships with all levels of staff within the company.
Assist the Internal Audit Manager in the preparation of a concise and informative audit report to effectively communicate the findings and recommendations to the Department and senior management.
Organize & reference work papers for review by Audit Manager.
Follow up on audit findings to ensure that the related section has taken corrective action against noted internal Audit department findings.
Other responsibilities assigned by the Internal Audit Manager.

Job Requirements
Bachelor's degree in computer science, a Master's degree is preferable. (CCNA certificate is an asset)
Good knowledge of telecommunication laws, rules, and regulations.
At least 2-3 years of related experience in the Audit & IT Department.
Fluent communication skills (written and verbal) in local languages as well as English.
Professional training or certificates in IT & Audit-related fields are a plus.
Understanding of multiple technology domains, including software development, Windows, Database Management, and Networking.
Capable of working independently and with minimal supervision.
Able to travel to all provinces of Afghanistan.
Outstanding interpersonal and communication skills; ability to communicate effectively with technical and non-technical audiences.
Expert knowledge of internal auditing, internal controls, and risk management.
Comprehensive understanding of internal control environments within the IT function.
Excellent leadership and teamwork skills.
Proactive, hands-on, results-driven orientation required.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates should fill out and submit the APPLICATION FORM with complete and correct information. To have access to the APPLICATION FORM, please copy and paste the link into your Web Browser.
https://forms.gle/zZAeCxpi9oAfLJTq6

new_jobs.title: IT Technician
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The IT Technician is responsible for managing the installation and troubleshooting of Wireless, Microwave, and VSAT links. The role includes resolving issues related to LAN network devices and addressing computer-related problems for customers through in-person support, phone consultations, or remote assistance. Additionally, the IT Technician provides technical support regarding computer operating systems, software applications, email configuration, installation processes, printing solutions, and the maintenance of customer LAN networks.

Duties and Responsibilities
Perform installation, activation, and troubleshooting of wireless links in accordance with company guidelines.
Execute the installation, activation, and troubleshooting of microwave links following established protocols.
Conduct installation, activation, and troubleshooting of VSAT links while adhering to company policies.
Install and configure LAN network devices to meet customer requirements effectively.
Troubleshoot LAN network devices and provide the best solution in case of second option availability.
Conduct surveys for network projects, arrange requirements, and implement solutions as needed.
DVR camera wiring, installation, and configuring based on the requirement.
UAT wireless base stations maintenance and resolving 1st level base station issues (in cooperation with Head Office)
Installing Wire and Wireless equipment at UA wireless base stations and ensuring 100% functionality upon completion.
Integrating technical solutions successfully done on-site and sharing it with other team members for future use.
Detailed daily and weekly reports to under-assigned manager.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree/Diploma in Computer Science and/ or relevant field.
A minimum of 3 years of experience in network installation and troubleshooting or a relevant field.
Relevant certifications (e.g., Cisco CCNA, MCITP, or equivalent) will be considered an advantage.
Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to communicate technical information effectively.
Full understanding and speaking of Dari, Pashto, and English.
Ability to ride a motorcycle and be comfortable using it when required for work-related tasks
Competencies (in order of importance)
Dependability — The job requires being reliable, responsible, dependable, and fulfilling obligations.
Attention to Detail — The job requires being careful about detail and thorough in completing work tasks.
Cooperation — The job requires being pleasant with others on the job and displaying a good-natured, cooperative attitude.
Analytical Thinking — The job requires analyzing information and using logic to address work-related issues and problems.
Integrity — The job requires being honest and ethical.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by June 10, 2026 . To apply, please send your cover letter along with an updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af . Please ensure the position title and vacancy number are included in the subject line of your email.
Position Title: IT Technician
Vacancy Number: UAT-VA-IT#2150-J

new_jobs.title: Creative Social Media & Digital Content Manager
new_jobs.description:
About Galaxy Cars Auctions LLC
Galaxy Cars Auctions LLC is an international digital automotive platform focused on transforming the way vehicles are bought and sold through live and online car auctions. Our platform connects buyers, dealers, and sellers globally, providing a secure, transparent, and technology-driven marketplace for vehicle trading. Our mission is to simplify and modernize the automotive auction industry by combining innovation, digital accessibility, and customer-focused services. Through advanced online auction systems, AI-powered search tools, and seamless user experiences, we aim to create a trusted global ecosystem for buying and selling vehicles anytime and anywhere.
At Galaxy Cars Auctions, we foster a dynamic, fast-paced, and growth-oriented work environment where creativity, professionalism, and innovation are highly valued. We encourage team members to take initiative, think creatively, and contribute to building a modern global automotive brand with strong digital presence and customer trust.
Explore more about Galaxy Cars Auctions LLC through our official website:
https://www.galaxycarsauctions.com

Job Description
Key Responsibilities:
Social Media Management
Develop and execute a strong social media strategy aligned with company branding and business goals
Manage and grow social media platforms including:
Instagram
Facebook
TikTok
YouTube
LinkedIn (if required)
Create and maintain a monthly content calendar
Schedule and publish content consistently
Monitor engagement and audience growth
Content Creation & Production
Plan, create, and produce high-quality content for digital platforms
Develop creative ideas for:
Reels
TikTok videos
YouTube Shorts
Long-form videos
Promotional videos
Educational and storytelling content
Write engaging content scripts (Script Writing) before production
Capture professional videos and photography
Create visually appealing posts, graphics, banners, and social media creatives
Video Editing & Motion Design
Edit professional videos for social media
Create cinematic and engaging short-form content
Add transitions, subtitles, sound design, effects, and storytelling elements
Produce motion graphics and animated content when required
Branding & Marketing
Maintain a consistent brand identity and visual style
Develop creative campaigns for awareness and audience engagement
Understand audience behavior and optimize content performance
Analyze content insights and improve strategy based on results
Team Coordination
Work closely with management and different departments
Coordinate content production activities
Guide junior staff or assistants if required
Required Skills & Software Knowledge
Applicants must have strong practical experience in the following:
Design & Content Tools
Canva (Advanced)
Adobe Photoshop
Adobe Lightroom
Video Editing & Motion Graphics
Adobe Premiere Pro (Advanced)
Adobe After Effects
DaVinci Resolve (Preferred)
Social Media & Content
Social media strategy
Content planning
Content calendar management
Script writing for videos
Creative storytelling
Copywriting
Visual storytelling
Technical & Marketing Skills
Basic understanding of:
Digital marketing
Social media algorithms
Audience targeting
Content optimization
Brand building
Social media analytics
Paid advertising (Meta Ads is a plus)
AI Tools (Highly Preferred)
Experience using AI tools for content creation and productivity:
ChatGPT
Canva AI tools
Video enhancement tools
AI-assisted script writing and content ideation

Job Requirements
Required Qualifications
Minimum 1–3 years of proven experience in social media management, digital content creation, or multimedia production
Strong portfolio showcasing:
Video editing
Creative content
Social media campaigns
Photography
Branding work
Strong communication skills in:
English
Dari
Pashto
Personal Qualities We Are Looking For
We are looking for someone who is:
Highly creative and innovative
Hardworking and committed
Self-driven and proactive
Able to work independently with minimal supervision
Trend-aware and constantly learning
Organized and deadline-oriented
Passionate about storytelling and content creation
Able to think outside the box
Detail-oriented with strong aesthetic sense

Submission Guidelines
Submission Requirements
Applicants must submit:
Updated CV/Resume
Portfolio or sample work (links preferred)
Social media pages previously managed (if available)
Short cover letter explaining:
Why you are suitable for this role
Relevant experience
Tools/software proficiency
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for interview and practical assessment.

expiring_today.title: Radio Operator
expiring_today.description:
Role Summary
These jobs are found in country Offices. Jobholders are based in Radio Rooms and typically report to an Information Technology Officer, Security Officer, or the designate. At this level, jobholders work in a team under minimal supervision, and they are expected to produce organized and accurate reports and technical work. As required, they may work with UNDSS Radio Room, especially in case of security incidents. These jobs may require working different shifts and reporting for duty on short notice. The purpose of this job is to support telecommunications services in order to facilitate the efficient implementation of security processes and procedures.

Duties and Responsibilities
Key Duty & Responsibilities:
Coordinate with WFP Security staff and/or UNDSS Radio Room to facilitate accurate and efficient security-related information flow following established standard operating procedures.
Responsible for monitoring and channelling all radio communications, including tracking of WFP vehicle and staff movement to ensure efficient 24-hour coverage of telecommunications Services.
Ensure optimal radio network operations through the implementation of standard operating procedures and the provision of guidelines and training to local radio operators in the region of Assignment.
Produce regular and ad hoc reports, including daily radio checks, staff movement reports and assist in preparing and dispatching the summary of security incidents and other information to staff to facilitate accurate, efficient and concise communication and information flow.
Provide efficient support and training to users on telecommunications equipment and Procedures including Minimum Operating Security Standards (MOSS) requirements to ensure effective use of telecommunications equipment.
Maintain inventory and provide recommendations for potential improvements to support Efficient planning and keeping WFP telecommunications equipment operational.
Create and maintain databases (e.g. lists of call signs, addresses, telephone numbers, wardens, etc.), to ensure accurate information is always available.
Follow established emergency response processes and procedures to ensure prompt assistance in case of emergencies.
Track mission vehicles and movement and provide a report to the head of security.
Equipped new arrival with telecom equipment with basic training and keep log incidents and office daily call office keys.
Monitor UHF repeaters, network and vehicle tracking application, programme telecom equipment and assign call signs to new arrival staff.
Desired Experience and Entry into the Role:
Official training and/or experience using MS Word, MS Excel, MS PowerPoint, and other WFP software is an advantage. Good knowledge of WFP administrative policies, procedures, a corporate application such as WINGS and good command of English and local language/s
Moderate level of knowledge of telecommunication operations, procedures, and high standards. Also have computer literacy, good communication skills with clarity and concisely.
Ability to multi-task and respond simultaneously and in a timely fashion to demanding job requirements.
Ability to prioritize a heavy workload and demonstrate judgment, initiative, alertness, and emotional stability, especially in emergency situations.
Functional capabilities & Competencies:
Keep operationalizing WFP Radio Network 24/7.
Track movement of staff 24/7 and arrange basic Radio training on a timely basis.
Track WFP vehicles and monitor VHF/UHF repeaters 24/7.
Headcount for international staff on the specified timetable with reporting to security unit.
Keep update incident logbook with reporting to security unit if needed with less than 5 minutes delay.
Provide ICT support and equipment delivery to the new arrival and ensure that no security alert is missed.
Achieve 100% security alert sharing with security warden and improve user’s satisfaction ratings by 20% from a security perspective.

Job Requirements
Qualification:
Education:
Completion of secondary school education. Technical training in communication equipment or other work-related areas.
Experience:
Four or more years of progressively responsible work experience in telecommunications/radio operations, information technology, or other relevant fields of work.
Languages:
Fluency (level C) in the UN language in use at the duty station and in the duty station’s language, if different.

Submission Guidelines
This vacancy announcement is for Afghan nationals only and WFP encourages especially Afghan females and Afghans with disabilities to apply.
Please copy and paste the following link into the web browser in order to apply for this position:
https://wd3.myworkdaysite.com/recruiting/wfp/job_openings/job/Kabul-AfghanistanThe-Islamic-Re/Radio-Operator-SC-G_JR123208

expiring_soon.title: Digital Marketing Assistant
expiring_soon.description:
About Zaiflow International LLC
Who We Are: An early-stage firm offering premium bookkeeping services provided by experienced Chartered Accountants.
Our Market: We exclusively target U.S.-based small businesses.
Our Mission: Helping small business owners understand profitability, avoid costly mistakes, and save time.

Job Description
We are looking for a creative and execution-focused Digital Marketing & Creative Assistant who can support our marketing team in content creation, videography, photography, and basic SEO activities.
This role is ideal for someone who is not only technical but also creative , and can turn ideas into high-quality visual and digital content.

Job Requirements
Basic to intermediate knowledge of Digital Marketing
Familiarity with social media platforms and content trends
Basic understanding of SEO (Search Engine Optimization)
Skills in videography and photography (shooting + basic editing)
Experience with design tools (Canva, Photoshop, or similar)
Ability to:
Think creatively
Execute ideas practically
Work with scripts and turn them into visual content
Strong work ethic, willingness to learn, and attention to detail

Submission Guideline
Submission Email
Please Send your CV/Cover letter to:
info@zaiflowintl.com
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

info@zaiflowintl.com

expiring_soon.title: کارشناس انتقال تکنالوژی جدید
expiring_soon.category: Economy, Information Technology, Software Engineering, Industrial
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
هدف وظیفه:
مجهز سازی سیستم های کاری و تولیدی با تکنالوژی های جدید صنعتی برای ایجاد همسویی با معیار های جهانی جهت رسیدن به اهداف شرکت انکشاف ملی.

Duties and Responsibilities
وظایف تخصصی
انتقال تکنالوژی جدید صنعتی مطابق نیازمندی شرکت انکشاف ملی از کشور های بیرونی.
پی گیری مشکلات تخنیکی و تکنالوژیکی سیستم های کاری و تولیدی شرکت انکشاف ملی و ارائه راه حل های مناسب برای رفع آنها.
ارزیابی و انتخاب تکنالوژی‌های مناسب برای پروژه‌های ملی با در نظر داشت شرایط محلی.
تحلیل امکان‌سنجی تخنیکی و اقتصادی تکنالوژی‌ صنعتی شامل عواید، مصارف، خطرات و پایداری.
محلی ‌سازی و انطباق تکنالوژی‌وارداتی با شرایط افغانستان.
مدیریت و پیگیری مسائل مربوط به مالکیت فکری ثبت، حفظ و استفاده از حقوق معنوی.
مستندسازی دانش، تجارب و ایجاد بانک معلوماتی تکنالوژی‌ های صنعتی .
نظارت بر رعایت معیارهای جهانی (کیفیت، محیط‌زیست، ایمنی) در استفاده از تکنالوژی‌ صنعتی.
ارائه معلومات و آموزش برای کارکنان فنی شرکت در عرصه استفاده از تکنالوژی جدید صنعتی.
وظایف مدیریتی
تدوین و تطبیق ستراتژی انتقال تکنالوژی صنعتی در سطح شرکت انکشاف ملی.
مدیریت پروژه‌های انتقال تکنالوژی از مرحله طراحی تا تطبیق و ارزیابی.
طراحی برنامه‌های آموزشی و انکشافی برای ارتقای ظرفیت کارمندان.
نظارت و ارزیابی عملکرد پروژه‌ها و سنجش تاثیرات توسعه‌ای.
شناسایی خطرات و ارائه راهکار های مدیریتی برای کاهش آن‌ها.
ارائه گزارش‌های تحلیلی به رهبری سازمان جهت تصمیم‌گیری بهتر.
وظایف هماهنگی
ایجاد و تقویت روابط با نهادهای جهانی، تمویل‌کنندگان و شرکت‌های تخنیکی.
هماهنگی با بخش‌های داخلی (تخنیکی، مالی، حقوقی و پالیسی) برای پیشبرد پروژه‌ها.
تسهیل انتقال دانش از متخصصین خارجی به کارمندان داخلی.
همکاری با پوهنتون ها، انستیتوت‌ها و مراکز تحقیقاتی برای ارتقای ظرفیت.
تنظیم و پیگیری قرارداد های انتقال تکنالوژی .
حمایت از نوآوری داخلی و ایجاد ارتباط با مخترعین.

Job Requirements
شرایط استخدام
تحصیلات:
حد اقل دارای سند لیسانس در یکی از رشته های اقتصاد صنعتی، انجینری نرم افزار، تکنالوژی معلوماتی و یا سایر رشته ‌های مرتبط؛ به درجات تحصیلی بالاتر ارجحیت داده میشود.
تجربه کاری:
حداقل ۵ سال تجربه کاری در زمینه های مرتبط برای لیسانس و ۳ سال برای ماستر.
مهارت ها:
توانایی کار با سافت ویر های امور تولید و آشنایی کامل در عرصه برنامه کمپیوتری مورد ضرورت در ادارات.

Submission Guidelines
علاقه‌مندان می‌توانند درخواست‌های شان‌را از طریق وبسایت Jobs.af بفرستند.
برای ارسال درخواستی روی Apply Now کلیک کنید.
نوت: ضمیمه سی‌وی، اسناد تحصیلی و تذکره تابعیت الزامی می‌باشد.

details.Functional Area: Economy, Information Technology, Software Engineering, Industrial

expiring_soon.title: IT & Graphic Design Officer
expiring_soon.description:
About Blossom Health care center
درباره ما
شفاخانه معالجوی بلاسم در سال ۲۰۰۴ در شهر کابل تأسیس شده است، امروز به‌عنوان یکی از مراکز معتبر، پیشرفته و آکادمیک صحی در افغانستان شناخته می‌شود. این مرکز با ظرفیت 50 بستر، محیطی معیاری و مجهز را فراهم ساخته تا مریضان در فضایی مصئون و آرام، خدمات صحی باکیفیت را دریافت نمایند.
بلاسم با داشتن ۱۰ دیپارتمنت فعال شامل داخله عمومی، جراحی عمومی، جراحی اعصاب، گوش، گلو و بینی (ENT)، نسائی ولادی، چشم، ارتوپیدی، جلدی، داخله اطفال و یورولوژی، توانسته است طیف گسترده‌ای از خدمات تخصصی و فوق‌تخصصی را زیر یک سقف ارائه کند. حضور تیمی از داکتران متخصص و مجرب در هر بخش، این شفاخانه را به یکی از مراکز قابل اعتماد برای تشخیص و تداوی مریضان مبدل ساخته است.
چشم‌انداز (Vision)
شفاخانه معالجوی بلاسم در نظر دارد تا با تکیه بر تخصص مسلکی، تکنالوژی پیشرفته طبی و مدیریت معیاری، به یکی از پیشرفته‌ترین، معتبرترین و مورد اعتمادترین شفاخانه‌های معالجوی کشور مبدل گردد؛ شفاخانه‌ای که در آن خدمات صحی تخصصی و فوق‌تخصصی مطابق با معیارهای ملی و بین‌المللی عرضه شده، مرجع درمانی مریضان در سطح کشور بوده و در ارتقای سلامت جامعه، کاهش مرگ‌ومیر قابل جلوگیری و بهبود کیفیت زندگی شهروندان نقش محوری ایفا نماید.
این چشم‌انداز همچنان بر توسعه پایدار، نوآوری دوامدار، آموزش طبی و پاسخ‌گویی مؤثر به نیازهای رو به افزایش صحی جامعه استوار می‌باشد.
مأموریت (Mission)
مأموریت شفاخانه معالجوی بلاسم عبارت است از عرضه خدمات صحی جامع، مصئون، مؤثر، با کیفیت و عادلانه به تمام اقشار جامعه بدون تبعیض، از طریق:
فراهم‌سازی خدمات تشخیصی، تداوی و جراحــــــی در بخش‌های تخصصی و فوق‌ تخصصی ( نسائی ولادی، جراحی عمومی، داخله عمومی، جراحی اعصاب، ارتوپدی، چشم، گوش گلو و بینی، جلدی، داخله اطفال، یورولوژی و قلبی، جهاز هضمی)
استفاده از تجهیزات مدرن طبی و تکنالوژی‌های نوین تشخیصی و درمانی
به‌کارگیری کادر مجرب، متخصص و متعهد طبی و اداری

Job Description
Position Summary
The IT & Graphic Design Officer is responsible for managing the hospital’s information technology systems, providing technical support, maintaining network infrastructure, supporting digital marketing activities, and designing professional visual materials for organizational branding and communication purposes.
Key Duties and Responsibilities
A. Information Technology (IT) Responsibilities
Install, configure, and maintain required software applications for all hospital departments.
Provide troubleshooting and technical support for computers, printers, scanners, and other digital devices.
Install, configure, maintain, and troubleshoot network equipment including Access Points, Switches, Routers, and related networking devices.
Distribute and manage internet services for all departments according to the approved list provided by the General Administration.
Coordinate and manage database-related activities.
C. Graphic Design Responsibilities
Design professional graphic materials including posters, banners, brochures, flyers, social media posts, certificates, and branding materials.
Create visual content for digital marketing campaigns and hospital awareness programs.
Edit photos, videos, and multimedia content when required for promotional or educational purposes.
B. Marketing Responsibilities
Manage and update the hospital’s social media platforms, website content, and online presence.
Prepare marketing materials, promotional content, announcements, and digital advertisements.
Coordinate with different departments to promote hospital services, events, and awareness campaigns.

Job Requirements
Qualifications and Skills
Proficiency in graphic design software such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva, AI tools.
Bachelor’s degree or diploma in Information Technology, Computer Science, Graphic Design, Marketing, or a related field.
Proven experience in IT support, graphic design, and digital marketing.

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates should submit their updated CV, cover letter to the hr.bhcc2026@gmail.com before the announced deadline.
Applicants must clearly mention the position title “IT & Graphic Design Officer” in the subject line of the email.

Submission Email
hr.bhcc2026@gmail.com

details.Education: Bachelor's degree in IT (certification in Graphic)

tech_banking_jobs.title: آمر جمع آوری پول Cash Collection Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description:
About Western ISP & ICT Solutions
شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن فعالیت های خویش را در جنوری ۲۰۱۶ به‌عنوان یک شرکت ارائه‌دهنده خدمات انترنتی آغاز کرد. در سال ۲۰۱۷، این شرکت تیمی را برای مدیریت کسب‌وکار آی اس پی تشکیل داد و با شرکت‌های پیشرو آی اس پی و جی اس ام در افغانستان را همکاری نمود
این شرکت روی بخش آی اس پی شرکت سرمایه‌گذاری کرده و در مدت کوتاهی زیربنای لازم را برای فعالیت به‌عنوان یک شرکت آی اس پی مستقل ایجاد نموده و در ماه می ۲۰۲۲ جواز آی اس پی خود را از وزارت مخابرات و تکنالوژی معلوماتی – اداره تنظیم خدمات مخابراتی افغانستان (اترا) دریافت کرد
شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن تمرکز خود را بر ارائه خدمات انترنتی با کیفیت بالا و هزینه مناسب در سراسر افغانستان معطوف نموده است
این شرکت با سرعت قابل توجهی در حال توسعه بوده و با کمک افراد متخصص و با تجربه به فعالیت خود ادامه میدهد. هدف شرکت وسترن ارائه راه ‌حل ‌ها و خدمات انترنتی برای تمام بخش‌ ها و سکتورهای افغانستان می‌باشد

Job Description
تطبیق اصول / مقررات
تطبیق اصول/مقررات به روش شرکت ( معیارات ما برای عملکرد مسلکی) مسؤلیت مشترک همه جوانب ذیدخل جهت اجرای ماموریت شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن است. ما باید همیشه روش شرکت و ( اصول/مقررات) محافظتی را رعایت کنیم
طبق پالیسی شرکت، این شرکت در برابر هر نوع نقض قوانین رفتاری/محافظتی که توسط کارمندان، مشاوران، داوطلبان، ارائه دهنده گان خدمات، فروشنده گان، سرمایه گذاران فرعی/شرکا، شرکت های وابسته و سایر شرکا صورت میگیرد، تحمل صفری دارد
هدف اصلی این بست کاری : آمر جمع آوری پول کسی است که مدیریت حسابات؛ تماس با مشترکین و نهایی کردن پرداخت ها استوار است؛ هدف اصلی آن به حد اقل رساندن مطالبات پولی شرکت و اطمینان از جریان نقدی منظم شرکت است
وظایف و مسئولیت ها
جمع آوری به موقع حق الاشتراک انترنت از مشترکین (حقیقی و حقوقی)؛ کاهش بدهی های پولی؛ ثبت دقیق پرداخت ها و مدیریت روابط با مشتریان در زمینه مالی در مطابقت با پالیسی های شرکت.
بررسی حسابات ؛ نظارت بر سیستم های مالی و حسابداری برای شناسایی مشترکینی که زمان پرداخت پول آن ها فرا رسیده یا گذشته است
تماس با مشترکین؛ تماس تیلفونی؛ ارسال ایمیل؛ پیام یا بازدید حضوری از مشترکین دارای بدهی پولی جهت یادآوری و دریافت پول
مذاکره برای پرداخت؛ گفتگو با مشتریان جهت تعیین تکلیف حساب ها؛ تنظیم اقساط یا نهایی کردن پرداخت های معوق
ثبت و راپوردهی؛ ثبت تمام تعاملات با مشتریان؛ تاریخ تماس ها و تعهدات پرداخت در دیتابیس شرکت
قطع خدمات؛ قطع کردن انترنت مشترکینی که پس از اخطار های مکرر از پرداخت حق الاشتراک خودداری کرده اند
حل منازعات مالی؛ بررسی اختلاف نظر های مالی بین شرکت و مشترک در مورد میزان بدهی و تلاش برای حل آن
جمع آوری نقدی؛ مراجعه حضوری به اماکن مشترکین تجاری/خانگی برای جمع آوری پول نقد یا چک و تحویل آن به خزانه شرکت
ارائه گزارش روزانه؛ هفتوار و ماهوار از وضعیت مجموع پول های جمع آوری شده به مدیر مالی یا مدیر فروشات
گزارش لست بدهکاران و حساب های با ریسک بالا
روابط اساسی کاری
امر جمع آوری پول در ارتباط مستقیم با مدیریت مالی است

Job Requirements
صلاحیت و شرایط
تحصیلات: حد اقل داشتن سند بکلوریا در یکی از رشته های مالی ؛ اقتصاد؛ اداره و تجارت؛ مدیریت مالی و حسابداری ویا معادل به آن ؛ به اسناد لیسانس ترجیح داده میشود
تجربه کاری : از دو الی سه سال مرتبط به بست فوق
مهارت ها
دانش خوب از أصول وقواعد، وسایل و اصطلاحات مالی و حسابداری
دانش خوب از شیوه های ایمنی معیاری مالی؛ حسابداری و کنترول مالیات
توانایی نظارت بر پروسه مالی
ابتکار عمل
قابلیت اطمینان؛ در هر نوع شرایط بر اساس بست فوق

Submission Guideline
ارسال نمایید hr@wsp.af ایمیل آدرس: سی‌وی خود را به آدرس ایمیل
.ضمیمه‌ها: علاقه‌مندان باید سی‌وی ارسال نمایند
اسناد دیگر: سرتیفیکت‌ها و سایر اسناد حمایوی در صورت ضرورت بعداً خواسته خواهد شد
عنوان ایمیل: لطفاً نام بست مورد نظر همراه با وکنسی نمبر و ولایت را به‌ طور واضح در موضوع ایمیل ذکر نمایید

Submission Email
hr@wsp.af

details.Years of Experience: حد اقل داشتن سند بکلوریا در یکی از رشته های مالی ؛ اقتصاد؛ اداره و تجارت؛ مدیریت مالی و حسابداری ویا معادل به آن
details.Education: دو الی سه سال مرتبط به بست فوق

tech_banking_jobs.title: مسؤل مالی
tech_banking_jobs.description:
About Western ISP & ICT Solutions
شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن فعالیت های خویش را در جنوری ۲۰۱۶ به‌عنوان یک شرکت ارائه‌دهنده خدمات انترنتی آغاز کرد. در سال ۲۰۱۷، این شرکت تیمی را برای مدیریت کسب‌وکار آی اس پی تشکیل داد و با شرکت‌های پیشرو آی اس پی و جی اس ام در افغانستان را همکاری نمود
این شرکت روی بخش آی اس پی شرکت سرمایه‌گذاری کرده و در مدت کوتاهی زیربنای لازم را برای فعالیت به‌عنوان یک شرکت آی اس پی مستقل ایجاد نموده و در ماه می ۲۰۲۲ جواز آی اس پی خود را از وزارت مخابرات و تکنالوژی معلوماتی – اداره تنظیم خدمات مخابراتی افغانستان (اترا) دریافت کرد
شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن تمرکز خود را بر ارائه خدمات انترنتی با کیفیت بالا و هزینه مناسب در سراسر افغانستان معطوف نموده است
این شرکت با سرعت قابل توجهی در حال توسعه بوده و با کمک افراد متخصص و با تجربه به فعالیت خود ادامه میدهد. هدف شرکت وسترن ارائه راه ‌حل ‌ها و خدمات انترنتی برای تمام بخش‌ ها و سکتورهای افغانستان می‌باشد

Job Description
تطبیق اصول / مقررات
تطبیق اصول/مقررات به روش شرکت ( معیارات ما برای عملکرد مسلکی) مسؤلیت مشترک همه جوانب ذیدخل جهت اجرای ماموریت شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن است. ما باید همیشه روش شرکت و ( اصول/مقررات) محافظتی را رعایت کنیم
طبق پالیسی شرکت، این شرکت در برابر هر نوع نقض قوانین رفتاری/محافظتی که توسط کارمندان، مشاوران، داوطلبان، ارائه دهنده گان خدمات، فروشنده گان، سرمایه گذاران فرعی/شرکا، شرکت های وابسته و سایر شرکا صورت میگیرد، تحمل صفری دارد
هدف اصلی این بست کاری : مدیر مالی مسئول رهبری، مدیریت، کنترول و انکشاف تمام امور مالی، حسابداری، بودیجوی، سرمایه‌ گذاری، امور خزانه، گزارش‌ دهی مالی و تطبیق معیار های مسلکی و بین‌ المللی می‌ باشد تا پایداری مالی، شفافیت، رشد پایدار و تصمیم‌ گیری ستراتیژیک شرکت تضمین گردد
وظایف و مسئولیت ها
اشتراک فعال در تدوین و تطبیق استراتیژی بزرگ شرکت
مشوره‌ دهی مالی به CEO و هیئت‌ مدیره در تصمیمات ستراتیژیک
تحلیل فرصت‌ های رشد، توسعه بازار، سرمایه‌ گذاری و کاهش ریسک
در شرکت (Financial Transformation) رهبری تحول مالی
ایجاد فرهنگ پاسخگویی، شفافیت و انضباط مالی
ارزیابی تأثیر مالی تصمیمات تخنیکی، عملیاتی و تجارتی
صبر و داشتن توانایی حفظ آرامش در موقعیت های استرس زا
توانایی کار به تنهایی
مهارت های خدمات مشتریان
دقیق بودن و توجه به جزئیات
آگاهی از ایمنی و امنیت عمومی
سلامت جسمانی و استقامت
توانایی سازماندهی زمان و حجم کار
تمایل به کمک به مردم
انجام هر وظیفه دیگری که توسط نظارت کننده مربوطه تعیین می شود
روابط اساسی کاری
نظارت بر روند کامل بر سیستم حسابداری شرکت؛ اطمینان از ثبت دقیق و به موقع تمام معاملات مالی

Job Requirements
صلاحیت و شرایط
تحصیلات: حد اقل داشتن سند لیسانس در یکی از رشته های مالی ؛ اقتصاد؛ اداره و تجارت؛ مدیریت مالی و حسابداری ویا معادل به آن ؛ به اسناد ماستری ترجیح داده میشود

مهارت ها
دانش خوب از أصول وقواعد، وسایل و اصطلاحات مالی و حسابداری
دانش خوب از شیوه های ایمنی معیاری مالی؛ حسابداری و کنترول عواید شرکت
توانایی نظارت بر پروسه مالی
ابتکار عمل
قابلیت اطمینان؛ در هر نوع شرایط بر اساس بست فوق
مهارت ها
دانش خوب از أصول وقواعد اداری
دانش خوب از شیوه های ارتباطات با مشتریان

ابتکار عمل
قابلیت اطمینان؛ در هر نوع شرایط بر اساس بست فوق
:مهارتهای مسلکی
مهارت تهیه کزارشات تحلیلی و مدیریتی
و سایر ابزار های تحلیلی MS Excel داشتن مهارت های عالی با
مهارت های ارتباطی قوی و کار گروپی/ تیمی
مهارت های ارتباطی و گزارش دهی
تسلط به زبان های پشتو، دری و انگلیسی
و انترنت ( MS Word ، Excel ، Access شامل ) مهارت های کمپیوتری
توانایی همکاری صادقانه و خالصانه، مسلکی و سازنده با دیگران بدون در نظر گرفتن ملیت، قومیت، جنسیت، مذهب، نژاد، قبیله یا سابقه ای فرهنگی

Submission Guideline
ارسال نمایید hr@wsp.af ایمیل آدرس: سی‌وی خود را به آدرس ایمیل
.ضمیمه‌ها: علاقه‌مندان باید سی‌وی ارسال نمایند
اسناد دیگر: سرتیفیکت‌ها و سایر اسناد حمایوی در صورت ضرورت بعداً خواسته خواهد شد
عنوان ایمیل: لطفاً نام بست مورد نظر همراه با وکنسی نمبر و ولایت را به‌ طور واضح در موضوع ایمیل ذکر نمایید

Submission Email
hr@wsp.af

tech_banking_jobs.title: Sharia Audit Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Sharia Audit Officer is responsible for conducting periodic Sharia audits across the bank to ensure all products, services, contracts, transactions, and operational processes fully comply with Islamic Sharia principles and the rulings of the Sharia Supervisory Board. The role helps preserve the bank’s Islamic integrity and strengthens governance.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Sharia Audit Planning & Execution
Participate in preparing the annual Sharia Audit Plan based on risk assessment.
Conduct field audits in branches and departments to verify adherence to Sharia guidelines.
Examine financing files, contracts, documentation, and transaction flows for Sharia compliance.
Test samples of Murabaha, Ijara, Musharaka, Mudaraba, and deposit transactions against Sharia standards.
2. Review of Contracts, Policies & Procedures
Audit the implementation of Sharia-approved product structures and documentation.
Ensure operational procedures match the product manuals approved by the Sharia Supervisory Board (SSB).
Check whether staff are following required Sharia workflows (e.g., asset ownership, agency structures, disclosures, penalties handling).
3. Identification of Sharia Non-Compliance
Identify Sharia violations, deviations, or gaps during audits.
Discuss findings with relevant departments and agree on corrective actions.
Ensure non-compliance events are recorded, reported, and resolved within the required timeframe.
4. Reporting & Documentation
Prepare clear Sharia audit reports with observations, recommendations, and compliance ratings.
Submit audit results to the Head of Sharia Audit and contribute to reports for the Sharia Supervisory Board.
Maintain proper documentation of all audit working papers and evidence.
5. Follow-Up & Corrective Actions
Follow up on previously reported Sharia findings to verify whether corrective actions were implemented.
Work with business units, risk management, operations, and compliance teams to close audit issues.
6. Coordination & Support
Coordinate with Internal Audit and Compliance Department for combined risk reviews.
Provide Sharia guidance to departments during audits to improve their understanding and performance.
7. Capacity Building & Awareness
Support the development of Sharia audit tools, checklists, and audit methodologies.
Assist in internal awareness sessions on Sharia compliance requirements for staff.
8. Continuous Improvement
Stay updated on AAOIFI Sharia standards, new fatwas, and industry best practices.
. Recommend improvements to Sharia audit processes and internal controls

Job Requirements
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor’s degree in Islamic Studies, Sharia, Islamic Finance, Accounting, or Business Administration.
Professional certification in Islamic finance or Sharia audit (preferred).
1–3 years of experience in Islamic banking, Sharia audit, internal audit, or compliance roles.
Familiarity with AAOIFI standards and Islamic banking products.
Skills & Competencies
Strong understanding of Islamic banking and Sharia principles.
Ability to analyze financial transactions and documentation.
Good report writing skills with clarity and accuracy.
Strong attention to detail and analytical mindset.
Excellent communication and coordination abilities.
High integrity, objectivity, and professionalism.

Submission Guidelines
Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV)/Resume to (sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com)
Please Mention specific Job Title in subject of your E-mail otherwise your Email will not be considered.
Note: only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further recruitment process.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Digital Banking Operation Manager (Re-announced)
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing the daily operational activities and ensuring the smooth functioning of key units within the Digital Banking Department. This includes Card Issuance and Management, Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution, Customer Service and Support, and Business & Operations. The role ensures efficient service delivery, operational excellence, compliance with regulatory requirements, and enhanced customer experience across all digital banking services.

Duties and Responsibilities
Card Issuance and Management:
Supervise the end-to-end card issuance process including debit, credit, prepaid and instant AfPay, MasterCards & VISA.
Coordinate with vendors and internal stakeholders for timely card production, delivery, and stock management.
Ensure compliance with card security standards and central bank regulations.
Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution:
Oversee daily transaction settlement and reconciliation processes with networks such as MasterCard, Visa, and AfPay.
Manage refund processing and timely resolution of customer disputes and chargebacks.
Coordinate with Finance, IT, and external partners to ensure settlement accuracy and integrity.
Customer Service and Support:
Lead the digital banking support team to provide timely and effective responses to customer inquiries and issues.
Monitor service levels and continuously improve customer support processes.
Handle escalated cases and ensure a professional and solution-oriented response.
Coordinate with the marketing to effectively and efficiently advertise the digital banking products and services to attract customers and share accurate information about the AUB digital banking products and services in social medias and website.
Leads the call center team for timely support for the digital banking services and products.
Business and Operations:
Coordinate daily business operations of the Digital Banking Department.
Implement and monitor SOPs for all operational activities.
Liaise with internal departments (IT, Risk, Compliance, Finance, etc.) for issue resolution and service enhancements.
Track KPIs and generate performance reports for senior management.
Lead accruals booking and manage digital banking operation cost and expenses.
Cross-functional Responsibilities:
Work closely with the Digital Banking Technical Manager and Deputy Head of DBD to align operations with technical developments and strategic initiatives.
Support the rollout of new digital products and services.
Ensure readiness for audits, regulatory reviews, and compliance reporting.
Reporting and Documentation:
Maintain detailed technical documentation, architecture designs, and process flows for all managed systems.
Provide regular performance, risk, and incident reports to the Deputy Head and Head of DBD.

Job Requirements
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, Finance or related field (Master’s preferred).
Experience:
Minimum of 5 years of experience in digital banking systems, with at least 2 years in a technical leadership role.
Technical Competencies:
Strong understanding of digital banking services, card operations, and payment systems.
Experience in settlement and dispute management.
Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills.
Familiarity with core banking systems and digital platforms.
Fluency in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is an advantage.
Knowledge of Core Banking Systems (CBS).
Other Skills:
Strong leadership and problem-solving abilities.
Excellent communication and coordination skills.
Fluency in English; knowledge of Dari and Pashto is an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number AUB/EA/VA/026-018 in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.

tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.
Requires quick work execution, competent English skills, honesty and reliability, and extensive knowledge or connections in Baghlan Province.

Duties and Responsibilities
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.

Job Requirements
Residing in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan; possessing basic English writing and communication skills; preference will be given to candidates with relevant government, military, or investigator experience; male candidates preferred

Submission Guidelines
Please submit your English resume on this website. Name your resume with your name and occupation. The resume should include your phone number, education, and detailed work experience (specifying position, company name, and responsibilities). Please update your resume regularly. Company staff will contact you via email; please check your inbox.
